mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ma_strategy WHERE is_buy_signal = 1 AND data_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) ORDER BY data_time DESC
SELECT * FROM ma_strategy WHERE is_sell_signal = 1 AND data_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) ORDER BY data_time DESC
SELECT * FROM ma_strategy WHERE etf_code = #{etfCode} ORDER BY data_time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT t1.* FROM ma_strategy t1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT etf_code, MAX(data_time) as max_time FROM ma_strategy GROUP BY etf_code ) t2 ON t1.etf_code = t2.etf_code AND t1.data_time = t2.max_time ORDER BY t1.data_time DESC
